prose:
**Furan HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, single-point calculation (not optimized). SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = −6.3597638 eV, LUMO = −0.1024036 eV → **gap = 6.2573602 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, representing the energy difference between the highest occupied and lowest unoccupied molecular orbitals; this is not an excitation energy). Additional Koopmans properties derived: vertical ionization potential = 6.360 eV, vertical electron affinity = 0.102 eV, electronegativity = 3.231 eV, chemical hardness = 3.129 eV, chemical softness = 0.320 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.668 eV. Calculation integrity: trustworthy (all checks passed). Command: `frontier-orbitals --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`.</prose>
